results.title: Citing ‘severe’ math deficits, University of California faculty demand a return to SAT tests for STEM applicants
results.description: More than 600 University of California faculty members, led by mathematicians at UC Berkeley, are calling on the system to reinstate standardized testing requirements for science, technology, engineering and mathematics applicants, saying that six years of test-free admissions has not...

results.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's last traces wiped from Frogmore Cottage
results.description: Frogmore Cottage, located within Home Park in Windsor, was given to Prince Harry and Meghan Markle as a wedding present by the late Queen in 2018.

results.title: I-84 traffic near Burley to shift onto new and temporary lanes
results.description: Starting Thursday, May 28, eastbound traffic on Interstate 84 near exit 208 in Burley will shift onto new concrete lanes

results.title: Paxton's win over Cornyn sets up high-stakes Texas clash with Talarico
results.description: President Trump again proved his political power in Texas as his endorsed candidate in the Senate primary won in a landslide. Ken Paxton secured the GOP nomination, beating incumbent Sen. John Cornyn. Paxton will face Democratic nominee James Talarico in the fall in what's set to be one of the nation's marquee midterm races. Geoff Bennett discussed the results with Brandon Rottinghaus.

results.title: Key Sens. Cruz, Cantwell look to break college sports logjam in Congress with a bipartisan bill

results.title: Historic Black Baptist church closes chapter with downtown service amid sale
results.description: Leadership received an offer in April for Mount Gilead Baptist Church’s 1912 building in downtown Fort Worth. Final services are May 31.

results.title: As waters rise, wildlife moves: Bear seen near Highway 43
results.description: Heavy rain and rising water are pushing animals out of flooded habitat—experts urge people to secure trash and give bears and alligators plenty of space.

results.title: Lismore music venue Blah Bar appeals for help
